title: ZeroDrift raises $10 million to protect AI models from themselves
snippet: A new AI compliance service sits between AI models and end users to flag and replace any messages that might present a compliance problem.

title: Rocket engine startup Impulse raises $500 million to hire people, not AI
snippet: Engineering physical systems still depends on human talent, according to Impulse Space president Eric Romo.

title: Pacific Fusion’s latest prototype packs 440 gigawatts into an 80-nanosecond burst
snippet: Pacific Fusion's sub-scale prototype delivered enormous amounts of power in a flash, setting the company up for its demonstration power plant.
